scripts.zip:itch: printf '{\n  "serverHost": "hidden-game.duckdns.org"\n}' > public/config.json && cd public && zip -r ../hidden-itch.zip . --exclude '*.DS_Store' && cd .. && printf '{}' > public/config.json && echo 'hidden-itch.zip ready'
scripts.test:perf:quick: PERF_BOT_COUNT=3 PERF_MEASURE_MS=4000 PERF_SAMPLE_INTERVAL_MS=1000 PERF_MIN_FPS=12 PERF_MAX_FRAME_P95_MS=120 PERF_MAX_RTT_P95_MS=400 PERF_MAX_TICK_P95_MS=35 PERF_MAX_TICK_OVER_BUDGET_RATIO=0.5 PERF_MAX_PROCESS_CPU_HOST_SHARE=90 node tests/perf-baseline.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:lint && npm run test:combat && npm run test:physics && npm run test:debug-stats && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:reconnect-countdown-edge && npm run test:supermajority-ready && npm run test:private-rooms && npm run test:chat && npm run test:browser && npm run test:heartbeat && npm run test:rate-limit && npm run test:hardening && npm run test:perf
